title: Behavior Send Event
description: Allows the mob to send an event to another mob.

cast_duration.description: Total duration of the cast in seconds.

sequence.description: Ordered list of events to send during the cast.

base_delay.description: Delay, in seconds, after which this event fires.

event.description: Name of the event to fire.

sound_event.description: Sound played at this step of the sequence.
